leads.name: Eliuth Larrainzar
leads.notes:
Sent Customer email: Subject: Culligan Water Ontario 

Message: Hi Mara, this is Anthony Vasquez from Hall's Culligan. Thank you for your time today discussing your water treatment options. As discussed, I'll send over the application for the RO drinking water system ($55/month). I can also include information about the whole house treatment if you and your husband are interested. I'll bring some fertilizer tips for your garden when we meet again! Let me know what time works best for your husband after 5pm this week.
